organizations.name: HackISU
organizations.description: Iowa State's premier hackathon organizing club. We host semesterly hackathons and weekly coding workshops.

organizations.name: Cyclone Robotics
organizations.description: Design and build robots for national competitions. Subteams for mechanical, electrical, and software.

organizations.name: Student Government
organizations.description: Represent the student body and advocate for student interests to university administration.

organizations.name: Outdoor Recreation Club
organizations.description: Hiking, camping, climbing, kayaking and more. Trips every other weekend during the semester.

organizations.name: Engineers Without Borders
organizations.description: Engineering solutions for developing communities. Current projects in Guatemala and Ghana.

organizations.name: ISU Dance Marathon
organizations.description: Year-long fundraising effort benefiting the University of Iowa Stead Family Children's Hospital.

organizations.name: Association of Business Students
organizations.description: Networking events, company visits, and professional development for Ivy College of Business students.

organizations.name: ISU Esports
organizations.description: Competitive and casual gaming community. Varsity teams in League of Legends, Valorant, and Rocket League.

organizations.name: Society of Women Engineers
organizations.description: Empowering women in engineering through mentorship, networking, and outreach.

organizations.name: Cyclone Marching Band
organizations.description: The Spirit of Iowa State! Performing at all home football games and special events.
